task_completion.description: Verify that an inventory named 'Chemical Compounds Library' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Chemical Compounds Library' in the SciNote inventory interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the five required custom columns are present in the inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the column headers 'CAS Number', 'Molecular Weight', 'Expiration Date', 'Purity Percent', and 'Hazard Classification' in the inventory table.

task_completion.description: Verify the record for Sodium Chloride is correctly populated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a row with the name 'Sodium Chloride'. Check that its CAS Number is '7647-14-5', Molecular Weight is '58.44', Purity Percent is '99.5', Hazard Classification is 'Not classified', and Expiration Date is empty.

task_completion.description: Verify the record for Acetic Acid is correctly populated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a row with the name 'Acetic Acid'. Check that its CAS Number is '64-19-7', Molecular Weight is '60.05', Purity Percent is '99.7', Hazard Classification is 'Flammable, Corrosive', and Expiration Date is empty.

task_completion.description: Verify the record for Ethanol is correctly populated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a row with the name 'Ethanol'. Check that its CAS Number is '64-17-5', Molecular Weight is '46.07', Purity Percent is '95.0', Hazard Classification is 'Flammable', and Expiration Date is empty.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the SciNote web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the SciNote interface in a web browser, not a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to directly insert database records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows showing SQL, curl, or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent typing or interacting with the inventory creation and data entry forms in SciNote.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected inventory name: 'Chemical Compounds Library'. Expected columns: 'CAS Number', 'Molecular Weight', 'Expiration Date', 'Purity Percent', 'Hazard Classification'. Expected rows: 'Sodium Chloride', 'Acetic Acid', 'Ethanol'.
